race.comment: Several here on the quick back-up. Happy to chance the former Victorian GIRLS GIRLS GIRLS (5) who has had two runs for the new yard finishing eighth at each. Will relish the extra ground now, having placed 3/4 this trip. Comes back from open class and gets chance to find form. ROCK REVOLUTION (1) looks a top chance if lining up again. Scored here on Saturday over a mile and on the quick back-up. Speedy type who will take catching again. ENTERPRISE LASSIE (3) was placed at weight for age behind Wolfburn two back then fifth here on Saturday over a mile. Extra trip a plus now. Nearing a win and expected to go close. FIGO THE GREAT (7) raced below his best last time when sixth over 1900m at this track, beaten 8 lengths. Likely improver with top-three prospects. DUTY (4) is a veteran fitter for three runs in but worth noting won only try course and distance. Gets chance to improve.
